title: fix(nova-canvas): use FetchHttpHandler in Workers runtime
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Painting with Nova Canvas again
gist.blurb: We fixed a pesky bug that was causing Nova Canvas to trip over its own paintbrushes in our Workers environment. It's back online and ready for your prompts!
gist.summary: Resolved a production 500 error for the Nova Canvas model by updating the Bedrock SDK to use a Fetch-compatible HTTP handler for Cloudflare Workers.
gist.impact: Users can once again successfully generate images using the Nova Canvas model without encountering server errors.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot fixing a literal digital canvas on an easel, representing the restored functionality of the Nova Canvas model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot working together to fix a glowing digital canvas on a wooden easel. The robot holds a tiny paintbrush, and the canvas displays a beautiful lime green (#ecf874) and pastel landscape. Soft warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
